transcription.text: The year 1853. A chef in Saratoga Springs invents a new snack food, a potato chip. Now, General Mills invents a shapely new snack, whistles. A whistle is a hole full of air with a cheese crust around it that crunches. You eat whistles for lunchtime, munchtime, snacktime, anytime. Try new whistles. Suddenly, snacks are in great shape. Also from General Mills. The year 1933. A new snack food appeared on the scene, corn chips. Now, General Mills invents a shapely new snack, bugles. A bugle is a shapely little horn that tastes like corn, and it crunches. You eat bugles for lunchtime, munchtime, snacktime, anytime. Try new bugles. Suddenly, snacks are in great shape.

Try new whistles. Suddenly, snacks are in great shape.
The year 1933. A new snack food appeared on the scene, corn chips.
Now, General Mills invents a shapely new snack, bugles.
A bugle is a shapely little horn that tastes like corn, and it crunches.
You eat bugles for lunchtime, munchtime, snacktime, anytime.
Try new bugles. Suddenly, snacks are in great shape.
